subject: [CPS] CPS Core Image Update
commit_message:
[CPS] CPS Core Image Update

Update CPS core image to the latest released version

Signed-off-by: Lukasz Rajewski <lukasz.rajewski@t-mobile.pl>
Issue-ID: CPS-1410
Change-Id: I6c77322eca4bf8cb031d901d615d55f15edb034c
